SMALL CLAIM APPEALS

MINI MINUTES: 10:07 am
Judge Pro David Fleisig, clerk - K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Bay Area Auto Magic Specialists,Inc. present by Pollard Clay as employee . Respondent Melvin Washington present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig.
